User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents a citizen's profile with their earned points, gamification status, and ward.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

points.description: Total gamification points earned by the citizen.

badge.description: Calculated badge based on points, e.g., Civic Hero.

ward.description: The home ward or area of the citizen.

Issue.title: Community Infrastructure Issue
Issue.description: Represents an infrastructure issue reported by a citizen, analyzed by Gemini, and tracked by the community.

title.description: Short title auto-generated or entered by user.

description.description: Citizen voice or text complaint details.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to the uploaded evidence image.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the issue location.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the issue location.

category.description: Detected issue category (pothole, garbage, public hazard, water leakage, etc.).

severity.description: Detected severity rating: Low, Medium, High, Critical.

duplicateOf.description: ID of a matching issue to prevent duplicate processing, empty if unique.

routingDepartment.description: Recommended municipality department (e.g. Municipal Water Department).

status.description: Issue status: Reported, Verified, Assigned, In Progress, Resolved.

reporterId.description: UID of the citizen who reported the issue.

trustScore.description: Calculated reliability percentage of the issue.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when status or fields were last updated.

Verification.title: Community Verification Vote
Verification.description: Represents a validation or verification action taken by a nearby user on a reported issue.

HotspotConfig.title: Hotspot Risk Prediction
HotspotConfig.description: AI-driven hazard risk mapping for various city wards.

primaryIssueType.description: Most recurrent issue category in this ward.

recommendation.description: Proactive action recommendation for municipal authorities.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile collection holding gamification points, ratings and personal details.

/issues/{issueId}.description: Community infrastructure reports with locations, categories, AI metrics, and departments.

/issues/{issueId}/verifications/{verific.description: Verification ledger where citizens confirm, reject, or mark issues as already resolved.

/hotspots/{wardId}.description: Aggregated ward hazard scores and predictive hotspot insights.
